name: Your lovely Literature Club friends, The Dokies.
description:
------------------------------------------------------------------------

Image: Mimi

Taking a short break after this one.

Clubmember/Protagonist Pov

------------------------------------------------------------------------

The original game is so intensly dark

『It's literally "Psychological Horror" after all』,

the girls did not deserve any of it

『My gal Sayori, nooooo...』,

but like...who would want to chat with the CANNON ones?

I looked through the lore and their backstories, personalities and so on...and made a decision, like all the time I make a bot for a darker character/characters, I tone it down a bit, they are esentially cannon, but like if they were born in our world and would be real people with real personalities and dreams, what wasn't listed or was unspecified, I made custom.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Anyway, I noticed my previus bots, especially the Furry ones, are insanely popular and very well recieved, you guys like furries?I can make more of them if you want.

『Need to milk well recieved bot genre as much as I can, of course :3』

And I hope you like the new design of the Bot's bio, I really like it myself.

Also...this is like...the 6th Harem bot I made so far...Im so damn original, I know.

『pls don't scold me for it』

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Anyway2, if you never played or saw the original game, I will explain it without spoilers, since I really like the game and the great c
creator: Nickardo
